properties.id: The ID of the provider identity.
properties.entity_id: The entity ID of the provider identity
properties.provider: The ID of the provider that created this identity.
properties.user_metadata: The user metadata of the provider identity.
properties.provider_metadata: The provider metadata of the provider identity.

properties.id: The ID of the auth identity.
properties.app_metadata: The app metadata of the auth identity

properties.id: The ID of the auth multifactor authentication factor.
properties.provider: The provider of the auth multifactor authentication
properties.status: The status of the auth multifactor authentication
properties.provider_metadata: The provider metadata of the auth multifactor authentication
properties.metadata: Holds custom data in key-value pairs.

properties.id: The ID of the auth multifactor authentication recovery code.
properties.code_hash: The code hash of the auth multifactor authentication recovery code

properties.id: The ID of the auth verification token.
properties.entity_id: The entity ID of the auth verification token
properties.token_hash: The token hash of the auth verification token
properties.expires_at: The expiry date of the auth verification token
properties.metadata: Holds custom data in key-value pairs.
